legal_review_handoff: Route to product counsel / compliance for adjudication of the escalated findings before any coverage, compliance, or filing decision. This skill does not approve, file, or bind the form.
disclaimer: Comparison evidence only; not a coverage, compliance, or filing determination. A licensed professional must adjudicate; no form has been filed, approved, or bound.
narrative: Comparison of subject manuscript form CGL-MS-77 (ed. 2026-07) against the filed baseline form CGL-0001 (ed. 2024-04) surfaced 7 material findings, every one of which touches an escalation clause type, a conflict, a gap, or a deviation from the filed form of record. A cyber exclusion (C-EXC-3) was added, which narrows coverage; the war exclusion (C-EXC-2) was removed, which broadens it; the insuring agreement (C-INS-1), a loss-notice condition (C-CON-2), and the aggregate limit (C-LIM-1) were reworded; C-CON-2 points to a definition C-DEF-2 that is absent from the subject form (a conflict); and the required governing-law clause is absent (a gap). Suggested review track: Legal/compliance review required. These findings and the questions beside them are for product counsel and compliance to adjudicate. Comparison evidence only; not a coverage, compliance, or filing determination. A licensed professional must adjudicate; no form has been filed, approved, or bound.
